title: No bail for murder accused, asks community
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The community and family of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The community and family of 28-year-old Athinkosi Jonas have united in protest, calling that no bail be granted to the four individuals accused of his murder in a suspected vigilante-style attack on Friday 1 August.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The community and family of 28-year-old Athinkosi Jonas have united in protest, calling that no bail be granted to the four individuals accused of his murder in a suspected vigilante-style attack on Friday 1 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The suspects, three men and a woman, were arrested shortly after the incident and made their first appearance in the Knysna Magistrate's Court on Monday 4 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All four were remanded in custody pending a formal bail application.","html":"All four were remanded in custody pending a formal bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The bail hearing is scheduled to take place today, Wednesday 13 August, with the community anxiously awaiting the outcome.","html":"The bail hearing is scheduled to take place today, Wednesday 13 August, with the community anxiously awaiting the outcome."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Emotions are running high as supporters of Jonas demand justice and oppose any possibility of the accused being released on bail.","html":"Emotions are running high as supporters of Jonas demand justice and oppose any possibility of the accused being released on bail."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: No bail for murder accused, asks community
